default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Catch-up between Greg and Marcel to discuss recent professional developments and explore potential collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/wcpwR8iPZV-CCkv6tP_5Xff5xtk6p2f6?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Greg took a full-time role with ArtPrize, securing $1.4M funding for a 12-month runway](https://fathom.video/share/wcpwR8iPZV-CCkv6tP_5Xff5xtk6p2f6?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Marcel's company (fwd.digital) is closing a $12M funding round, led by Madrona VC](https://fathom.video/share/wcpwR8iPZV-CCkv6tP_5Xff5xtk6p2f6?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [fwd.digital has developed a framework for AI workflows as code, growing rapidly ($6M ARR, 54 deals in pipeline)](https://fathom.video/share/wcpwR8iPZV-CCkv6tP_5Xff5xtk6p2f6?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Both are working on innovative AI-driven solutions in their respective fields](https://fathom.video/share/wcpwR8iPZV-CCkv6tP_5Xff5xtk6p2f6?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)

## Topics

### Greg's New Role at ArtPrize

  - [Accepted full-time position after initial hesitation](https://fathom.video/share/wcpwR8iPZV-CCkv6tP_5Xff5xtk6p2f6?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [24-month commitment to lead and expand the initiative](https://fathom.video/share/wcpwR8iPZV-CCkv6tP_5Xff5xtk6p2f6?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Secured $1.4M in funding, providing 12-month runway](https://fathom.video/share/wcpwR8iPZV-CCkv6tP_5Xff5xtk6p2f6?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Collaboration with OpenAI on new model testing](https://fathom.video/share/wcpwR8iPZV-CCkv6tP_5Xff5xtk6p2f6?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)

### Marcel's Company (fwd.digital) Progress

  - [Closing $12M funding round, led by Madrona VC](https://fathom.video/share/wcpwR8iPZV-CCkv6tP_5Xff5xtk6p2f6?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Rapid growth: $6M ARR, up from $2.9M in 8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/wcpwR8iPZV-CCkv6tP_5Xff5xtk6p2f6?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [54 deals in pipeline, estimated $8M potential](https://fathom.video/share/wcpwR8iPZV-CCkv6tP_5Xff5xtk6p2f6?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [Hiring push for top-tier engineers (ex-Stripe, Figma, Airbnb)](https://fathom.video/share/wcpwR8iPZV-CCkv6tP_5Xff5xtk6p2f6?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)

### fwd.digital's AI Workflow Framework

  - [Paradigm shift for knowledge work, similar to infrastructure-as-code](https://fathom.video/share/wcpwR8iPZV-CCkv6tP_5Xff5xtk6p2f6?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Framework enables building, running, and observing AI workflows as code](https://fathom.video/share/wcpwR8iPZV-CCkv6tP_5Xff5xtk6p2f6?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Generates frontier data for fine-tuning and creating reward systems](https://fathom.video/share/wcpwR8iPZV-CCkv6tP_5Xff5xtk6p2f6?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Focuses on outcomes, config files for work processes, and expert involvement](https://fathom.video/share/wcpwR8iPZV-CCkv6tP_5Xff5xtk6p2f6?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)

### Potential Collaboration

  - [Marcel expressed interest in bringing Greg on as an advisor](https://fathom.video/share/wcpwR8iPZV-CCkv6tP_5Xff5xtk6p2f6?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Synergies identified due to shared connections and complementary expertise](https://fathom.video/share/wcpwR8iPZV-CCkv6tP_5Xff5xtk6p2f6?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Plan to formalize advisory relationship after funding round closes](https://fathom.video/share/wcpwR8iPZV-CCkv6tP_5Xff5xtk6p2f6?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)

### AI Development Processes

  - [Greg shared experience with AI-assisted development using Cursor](https://fathom.video/share/wcpwR8iPZV-CCkv6tP_5Xff5xtk6p2f6?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Discussed the importance of expert oversight in AI-generated workflows](https://fathom.video/share/wcpwR8iPZV-CCkv6tP_5Xff5xtk6p2f6?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Parallels drawn between Greg's experience and fwd.digital's approach](https://fathom.video/share/wcpwR8iPZV-CCkv6tP_5Xff5xtk6p2f6?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to finalize funding round closure](https://fathom.video/share/wcpwR8iPZV-CCkv6tP_5Xff5xtk6p2f6?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Marcel to reach out to Greg in 1-2 weeks to discuss advisory role](https://fathom.video/share/wcpwR8iPZV-CCkv6tP_5Xff5xtk6p2f6?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [Plan in-person meeting at Larkspur farmers market to further discuss collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/wcpwR8iPZV-CCkv6tP_5Xff5xtk6p2f6?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)

action_items.description: Follow up w/ Greg in 1-2 wks post-fundraising close to discuss advisory role & schedule mtg at Larkspur farmers market
